backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the event management platform backend with user profiles (organizer/participant roles), event CRUD operations, team management, registration, check-in tracking, winner declaration, and role-based access control using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, organizer dashboard, event management, participant dashboard, registration, team management) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components including routing, hooks, authentication, dashboards, event/team management, and UI components with their specific responsibilities and features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space for consistent theming across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and script reference to main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for landing, organizer/participant dashboards, event details, and team joining pages, plus ThemeProvider wrapper and conditional ProfileSetupModal display.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component handling Internet Identity login/logout with query cache clearing and loading states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup collecting name, email, and role selection (organizer/participant) with visual role cards and form validation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout component with header navigation, role-based menu items (organizer/participant), user authentication status, and footer with social links.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Attend: Dialog component displaying event attendees with their check-in status, fetching registration and check-in data, and showing user profiles for each attendee.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Create: Form component for creating new events with fields for title, description, date/time, and venue, using mutation hook to submit data.
frontend/src/components/organizer/EditEv: Dialog component for editing existing event details, pre-populated with current event data and using update mutation to save changes.
frontend/src/components/organizer/EventL: Table component displaying organizer's events with status badges, participant counts, view/delete actions, and confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Export: Button component that exports event data (participants, teams, check-in status) to CSV format by fetching user profiles and generating downloadable report.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Winner: Dialog component allowing organizers to select and declare a winning team from the list of event teams.
frontend/src/components/participant/Crea: Dialog component with form for participants to create a new team for a specific event by providing a team name.
frontend/src/components/participant/Even: Displays a grid of event cards with details like date, venue, and participant count, showing an empty state when no events exist. Each card has a 'View Details' button that navigates to the event page.
frontend/src/components/participant/Invi: A dialog component that generates and displays a team invitation link with options to copy it or share via email and WhatsApp. Uses toast notifications for user feedback on copy actions.
frontend/src/components/participant/Team: Displays a team card showing team name, member count, and leader badge, with buttons to invite members or leave the team. Team creators see an invite button while members see a leave button.
frontend/src/components/participant/Winn: Renders a celebratory banner with trophy icons when an event has a winning team, displaying the team name and member count. Returns null if no winning team exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Automatically invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation. Includes a provider component and useInternetIdentity hook for accessing auth state throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, events, teams, and registrations. Each mutation hook includes toast notifications and automatic query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light and dark themes using emerald green as primary and warm orange as accent colors. Defines CSS variables for consistent theming across the application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up the React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication. Renders the main App component with necessary context providers.
frontend/src/pages/EventDetailsPage.tsx: Displays detailed event information with role-based actions (organizer can edit/declare winners, participants can register/check-in/create teams). Shows event statistics, team lists, and winner banners.
frontend/src/pages/JoinTeamPage.tsx: Handles team invitation flow where users can view team details and join a team via a shared link. Redirects to event page after successful join.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page showcasing platform features (event management, teams, analytics, notifications) with hero banner. Auto-redirects authenticated users to their role-specific dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: Organizer dashboard displaying event statistics (total events, participants, winners) with tabs for viewing event list and creating new events. Role-protected with redirect for non-organizers.
Participant dashboard showing searchable grid of all available events with hero banner. Role-protected with redirect for non-participants.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and persisting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius utilities, shadows, and accordion animations. Includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document defining a multi-event management platform with React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, MongoDB database, JWT authentication, role-based access (organizer/participant), team collaboration, event registration, notifications, and winner management features.
